scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace transportadora-api" "npm run dev --workspace transportadora-web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace transportadora-api && npm run build --workspace transportadora-web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace transportadora-api && npm run test --workspace transportadora-web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace transportadora-api && npm run lint --workspace transportadora-web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
